attempts.strategy: Step 1c bridge — rewrite ∏ᶜ to Finset.inf' over Finset.image x Finset.univ so the project's basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isAffineOpen helper applies. Sidesteps the universe mismatch on Mathlib's CompleteLattice.finite_product_eq_finset_inf (which requires α, ι : Type u same-universe; Fin (n+1) : Type 0 ≠ Opens : Type u).
attempts.code_tried:
classical
have h_pi_eq_inf' (x : Fin (n + 1) → ↑s₀) :
    (∏ᶜ fun a => basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) ↑s₀ (x a)) =
      (Finset.image x Finset.univ).inf'
        (Finset.image_nonempty.mpr Finset.univ_nonempty)
        (basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) (↑s₀ : Set Γ(C.left, U))) := by
  rw [show (∏ᶜ fun a => basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) ↑s₀ (x a)) =
      ⨅ a, basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) ↑s₀ (x a) from
    le_antisymm (le_iInf fun a => leOfHom (Pi.π _ a))
      (leOfHom (Pi.lift fun a => homOfLE (iInf_le _ a)))]
  rw [← Finset.inf_univ_eq_iInf, ← Finset.inf'_eq_inf]
  exact (Finset.inf'_image
      (s := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin (n+1)))) (f := x)
      (hs := Finset.image_nonempty.mpr Finset.univ_nonempty)
      (g := basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) (↑s₀ : Set Γ(C.left, U)))).symm
attempts.lean_error: (no error — h_pi_eq_inf' elaborates clean and the file compiles end-to-end)
attempts.goal_before: trailing sorry at L1802 of h_loc_exact body, with h_V_le_U and h_slice_eq from iter-108 in scope.
attempts.goal_after: h_pi_eq_inf' x : (∏ᶜ ...) = (Finset.image x univ).inf' ... basicOpenCover ↑s₀ — in scope. Unblocks h_V_affine via h_pi_eq_inf' x ▸ basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isAffineOpen hU ↑s₀ (Finset.image x univ) _.
attempts.insight: Direct rw on Mathlib's CompleteLattice.finite_product_eq_finset_inf fails for universe-mismatch reasons (Fin (n+1) : Type 0 vs Opens : Type u); the workaround is a 3-step bridge: (i) ∏ᶜ → ⨅ via Pi.π/Pi.lift le_antisymm, (ii) ⨅ → Finset.univ.inf via Finset.inf_univ_eq_iInf, (iii) Finset.univ.inf' (g ∘ x) → (Finset.image x univ).inf' g via reversed Finset.inf'_image. This is reusable for any future Fin-indexed ∏ᶜ → image-Finset.inf' bridging inside a Čech proof.

attempts.strategy: h_V_affine — derive IsAffineOpen of the slice cover by transport along h_pi_eq_inf' and applying the project's basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isAffineOpen helper (iter-057 vintage).
attempts.code_tried:
have h_V_affine (x : Fin (n + 1) → ↑s₀) :
    IsAffineOpen (∏ᶜ fun a => basicOpenCover (C := C) (U := U) ↑s₀ (x a)) :=
  h_pi_eq_inf' x ▸ basicOpenCover_finset_inf'_isAffineOpen hU
    (↑s₀ : Set Γ(C.left, U)) (Finset.image x Finset.univ)
    (Finset.image_nonempty.mpr Finset.univ_nonempty)

attempts.lean_error: intro fails: 'No additional binders to introduce' — letI in goal type elaborates eagerly during type-checking; the body sees the goal without binders.
attempts.goal_before: Set up per-x algebra instances for the instIsLocalizedModuleToLinearMapToAlgHomOfIsLocalizationAlgebraMapSubmonoid adapter.

attempts.insight: letI ... in <goal> form does NOT propagate to the proof body's typeclass inference under Lean 4's elaboration model. The letI elaborates immediately during goal type-checking, so the body has no `intro` targets and the local typeclass instances are not visible to `infer_instance`. This is a recurring trap; documented for the Knowledge Base.
